column3: Origin_Clade_Phylogenetic_Block (phylogenetic block for origin clade format Parent_Clade::Child_Clade)
column4: Origin_Clade_Phylogenetic_Path (phylogenetic path for origin clade comma delimited from root to origin clade)
column6: Total_Phylogenetically_Inherited_Transitions (count of all parent to child clade transitions descended from origin clade where orthogroup was phylogenetically inherited)
column7: Conservation_Events_Actually_Present_In_Both_Parent_And_Child (count of transitions where orthogroup actually present in descendant species of both parent and child clades)
column8: Loss_At_Origin_Events_Present_In_Parent_Absent_In_Child (count of transitions where orthogroup present in parent species but absent in child species representing phylogenetic origin of gene loss)
column9: Continued_Absence_Events_Absent_In_Both_Parent_And_Child (count of transitions where orthogroup absent in both parent and child species meaning loss occurred earlier and absence continues)
column10: Loss_Coverage_Events_All_Transitions_Where_Absent_In_Child (count of all transitions where orthogroup absent in child species calculated as loss at origin plus continued absence)
column11: Conservation_Rate_Percent (percentage of inherited transitions showing conservation calculated as conservation events divided by total inherited transitions times 100)
column12: Loss_At_Origin_Rate_Percent (percentage of inherited transitions where gene loss first occurs calculated as loss at origin events divided by total inherited transitions times 100)
column13: Percent_Phylogenetic_Tree_With_Orthogroup_Actually_Present (percentage of phylogenetic tree where orthogroup is present calculated as conservation events divided by total inherited transitions times 100)
column14: Percent_Phylogenetic_Tree_Lacking_Orthogroup (percentage of phylogenetic tree where orthogroup is absent calculated as loss coverage events divided by total inherited transitions times 100)
column15: Species_List (comma delimited list of all species containing this orthogroup)
column16: Sequence_IDs (comma delimited list of short sequence identifiers in this orthogroup)
